title: Functions, Parameters, this, and Callable Contracts · Language Lens: Recursion Stack
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable transformations, callbacks, methods, and boundary adapters. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js recursion stack increment in a function-oriented routing toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose recursion or iteration from data shape, stack depth, termination, and clarity constraints.
Design callbacks and higher-order functions with explicit timing, error, and return-value contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
